title: Zymego - Automated Scheduling for Healthcare Appointments
problem: 5-20% of healthcare appointments are missed due to late cancellations, resulting in millions of wasted time slots annually at enormous economic cost.
solution: Automatic digital waiting list for cancelled appointments. Fully automated system that fills empty time slots by offering them to waiting patients. Reduces admin burden and shortens patient wait times.
technology: Automated scheduling, digital waiting list, notifications
traction_signals: Addresses quantified market problem (5-20% no-show rate)
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Direct complement to booking infrastructure. Could integrate with EHR booking flow. Solves real operational pain point for clinics we serve.
notes: Priority for deep research. Check funding, traction, customers.
